F / 01 · Lead

Sid can lead.
And he’s done it at scale.

20+ events. ₹20L+ in budgets. Three flagships and the front of the room every time. Lead Coordinator, sponsorship lead, head of marketing, chief advisor — same person, same job.

F / 02 · Build

Sid can build.
Ideas, products, and machines.

Two AI products in flight, a hybrid carbon-fibre chassis under construction, and a steady consulting practice for SMBs. Building is the through-line.

Hospitality AI · Voice

Butler AI

An AI layer integrated into hotel Property Management Systems. Voice-command control of front-desk workflows. Personalised, always-on guest experience that reduces front-desk load.

PMSVoiceHospitality
Apparel AI · Personal styling

SOL — Story of Your Life

An AI-powered personal clothing stylist. Users design and customise garments to celebrity-level precision, telling their story through what they wear.

AIApparelConsumer
Mech Eng · Composites

Hybrid monocoque chassis

Carbon-fibre / steel hybrid chassis. Designed, modelled, and FEA-tested. Construction in progress. Composite and structural engineering applied properly.

Carbon fibreFEACAD
